title: Numerical Fracture Datasets
description: A curated collection of numerical datasets from fracture mechanics experiments, covering multiple approaches, models, and sources. Datasets include results from phase-field fracture models, cohesive zone models, XFEM, and other computational fracture mechanics methods.
notes: Data generated via numerical simulations of fracture mechanics. See the repository README and individual dataset READMEs for full provenance, model descriptions, and parameter details.
